parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ simulation_specification: { simulated_user_config: { first_message: $json.simulated_user_prompt, language: 'en' } }, extra_evaluation_criteria: $json.evaluation_criteria || [], new_turns_limit: 15 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_id: $json.agent_id, failures: $json.detailed_results.filter(r => !r.passed), total_tests: $json.summary.total_scenarios, passed_tests: $json.summary.passed, dominant_pattern: $json.dominant_pattern, source: 'elevenlabs-conversation-eval' }) }}

meta.summary: Conversation evaluation endpoint for voice-agent QA.
